evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-25 one bounded official New Mexico education directory pass beyond the previously failing PED hosts, then rechecked the live PED-managed workbook exports directly on 2026-06-25. The public SharePoint school-directory host `https://webed.ped.state.nm.us/sites/schooldirectory/SitePages/Home.aspx` is live and returns HTTP 200, and the official public downloads `NM Schools.xlsx`, `Superintendents.xlsx`, and `REC Directors.xlsx` also return HTTP 200 from the same host. A fresh bounded workbook-structure inspection confirmed all three are single-sheet exports with district, superintendent, and REC contact columns but no county field and no REC county-service-area labels. New Mexico education therefore remains blocked on an official county-to-district or county-to-REC crosswalk, not on total absence of a public PED directory lane.
The exact official DVR root returns HTTP 401 and no reviewed alternate first-party VR / Pre-ETS source is preserved on disk yet.
